# saige — Super AI Graph Ecosystem

> A unified Go SDK for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines.

Combines three packages: agent (streaming AI agent loop with typed deltas, tool dispatch, sub-agents, provider adapters, and RLHF feedback), knowledge (LLM-powered knowledge graph construction with SurrealDB and hybrid search), and rag (multi-modal RAG pipelines with chunking, multi-retriever fusion, reranking, and citations).

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Overview, installation, quick start
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Architecture, packages, commands, code style
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, commit conventions

## Key Files

- Agent: agent/agent.go, agent/types/provider.go, agent/types/tool.go, agent/types/message.go, agent/types/delta.go, agent/types/content.go, agent/types/node.go
- Knowledge: knowledge/config.go, knowledge/types/types.go, knowledge/surrealdb/store.go
- RAG: rag/config.go, rag/types/types.go, rag/internal/pipeline/pipeline.go
